name: Support Issue Learning Registry
description: Machine-readable registry of production/support issue patterns LocalAIFactory should learn to detect and respond to. Mirrors the production-issue-fixes knowledge pack. sourceType is official (vendor/standards docs), community (widely-reported developer patterns, verification recommended), or firsthand (observed in this project). officialSourceConfirmation indicates whether the core behaviour is documented by an official source; it is true for documented behaviours and false for firsthand or community-only patterns that have not been cross-checked against an official source.

issues.title: ASP.NET Core IIS deployment failure
issues.symptoms: 500.x or blank page under IIS while Kestrel runs cleanly.
issues.rootCause: Wrong physical path, missing runtime/hosting bundle, or malformed web.config aspNetCore handler.
issues.diagnosticCommand: dotnet publish -c Release -o ./publish ; dotnet ./publish/App.dll
issues.knownFix: Deploy publish output, install matching Hosting Bundle, point IIS physical path at the publish folder.
issues.preventionRule: Never point IIS at the source tree; deploy a fresh publish output with a pinned runtime.
issues.detectBy: Deploy job: 500.x under IIS but Kestrel probe succeeded.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: check Hosting Bundle, web.config, and physical path before editing code.

issues.title: ANCM / Hosting Bundle missing or mismatched (firsthand: absent on fresh IIS)
issues.symptoms: ANCM start failure or aspNetCore handler not registered.
issues.rootCause: Hosting Bundle missing, too old, or installed without iisreset; fresh IIS host had no ANCM at all.
issues.diagnosticCommand: dotnet --list-runtimes ; check the ASP.NET Core Module under IIS native modules.
issues.knownFix: Install matching ASP.NET Core Hosting Bundle, then iisreset.
issues.preventionRule: Script Hosting Bundle install + iisreset into deployment.
issues.detectBy: Event log/IIS references to ANCM start failure or missing module.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: install Hosting Bundle + iisreset rather than changing app code.

issues.title: IIS Windows Authentication failure
issues.symptoms: 401 loops, endless prompts, or unexpected anonymous identity.
issues.rootCause: Windows auth disabled, Anonymous enabled, missing Negotiate, or SPN/Kerberos gap.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Inspect WWW-Authenticate header; confirm IIS Windows-Authentication feature and site settings.
issues.knownFix: Enable Windows auth, disable Anonymous, register Negotiate, verify app-pool SPN.
issues.preventionRule: Automate auth config; test with a domain account before release.
issues.detectBy: Repeated 401 with Negotiate/NTLM and no successful token.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: IIS/AD auth wiring, not an app policy bug.

issues.title: SQL Server Express connection failure
issues.symptoms: Network-related error, login timeout, or instance not found.
issues.rootCause: Wrong instance name, SQL Browser stopped, TCP/IP disabled, or firewall block.
issues.diagnosticCommand: sqlcmd -S .\SQLEXPRESS -E -Q "SELECT @@VERSION"
issues.knownFix: Start SQL Browser (or static port), enable TCP/IP, open firewall, fix instance name.
issues.preventionRule: Standardize instance name; keep connection string in environment config.
issues.detectBy: Startup migration/first query fails with a SQL network error.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: verify instance name, SQL Browser, TCP/IP, firewall first.

issues.title: EF Core migration failure on startup
issues.symptoms: Pending-migration error, 'table already exists', or snapshot/model mismatch.
issues.rootCause: Unapplied migrations, snapshot drift, destructive change, or duplicate heads.
issues.diagnosticCommand: dotnet ef migrations list ; dotnet ef database update
issues.knownFix: Apply pending migrations, regenerate snapshot via EF, reconcile heads.
issues.preventionRule: Keep migrations additive; regenerate the snapshot through EF, never by hand.
issues.detectBy: Startup auto-migrate step throws a migration/snapshot error.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: inspect migrations list + snapshot; block destructive changes.

issues.title: App-pool identity / SQL permission failure
issues.symptoms: 'Login failed for user' for a machine/app-pool account, or permission-denied.
issues.rootCause: App-pool identity has no SQL login or insufficient role.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Read SQL error for the rejected principal; query sys.database_principals.
issues.knownFix: Create a SQL login for the app-pool identity, grant least-privilege roles only.
issues.preventionRule: Provision the app-pool login at deploy time; keep is_sysadmin=0.
issues.detectBy: 'Login failed' naming a machine or IIS APPPOOL principal.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: grant least-privilege SQL access; never elevate to sysadmin.

issues.title: HTTPS certificate binding failure in IIS
issues.symptoms: HTTPS unreachable on 443 or certificate warning/mismatch.
issues.rootCause: Missing binding, deleted/expired cert, missing private key, or hostname/SAN mismatch.
issues.diagnosticCommand: netsh http show sslcert ; review IIS 443 binding.
issues.knownFix: Import cert with private key, repair 443 binding, match hostname to SAN.
issues.preventionRule: Track cert expiry; automate renewal and binding.
issues.detectBy: 443 binding missing or pointing at an invalid/expired cert.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: repair binding and verify cert+private key, not app code.

issues.title: 'netsh http add sslcert' failure
issues.symptoms: netsh sslcert add fails with 1312, 1168, or 'parameter is incorrect'.
issues.rootCause: Bad certhash (spaces/non-hex), wrong appid, cert not in LocalMachine, or port bound.
issues.diagnosticCommand: netsh http show sslcert ; verify thumbprint with no spaces in LocalMachine\My.
issues.knownFix: Delete stale binding then add with clean certhash and valid appid GUID.
issues.preventionRule: Copy thumbprint programmatically and strip whitespace.
issues.detectBy: netsh sslcert error code 1312/1168 in deploy logs.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: clean thumbprint and confirm cert store before retry.

issues.title: appsettings / environment configuration mistakes
issues.symptoms: Wrong connection string/flag in deployed env; 'works locally'.
issues.rootCause: Environment mismatch, provider override precedence, or untransformed config deployed.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Log effective config values + ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT at startup.
issues.knownFix: Align environment variable, deploy correct appsettings.{Environment}.json, respect provider order.
issues.preventionRule: Keep secrets in environment variables, never in committed files.
issues.detectBy: Effective config differs from expected at startup.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: check ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT and provider precedence first.

issues.title: stdout logging / locked log file issues
issues.symptoms: No logs, recycles, or locked/access-denied on the log file.
issues.rootCause: Missing/unwritable log folder, stdout logging left on, or file held by a prior process.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Set stdoutLogEnabled=true with a writable stdoutLogFile, reproduce, read output.
issues.knownFix: Create log dir, grant write, capture error, then disable stdout logging.
issues.preventionRule: Use stdout logging only briefly for startup diagnosis.
issues.detectBy: Empty or locked stdout log path during a failed start.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: enable stdout logging temporarily to capture the startup exception.

issues.title: IIS 500.19 configuration data invalid
issues.symptoms: HTTP 500.19 'invalid configuration data' / cannot read config.
issues.rootCause: Malformed web.config, missing IIS module, or NTFS permission on config.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Validate web.config XML; check the 500.19 error code; confirm required modules.
issues.knownFix: Fix web.config XML, install missing module (URL Rewrite/Hosting Bundle), correct permissions.
issues.preventionRule: Validate web.config in publish; ship required modules with the host.
issues.detectBy: 500.19 with a configuration error code.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: validate web.config and install missing module first.

issues.title: ASP.NET Core 500.30 startup failure
issues.symptoms: HTTP 500.30 'app failed to start'.
issues.rootCause: Unhandled startup exception: config/DI/dependency/binding.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Run 'dotnet ./publish/App.dll' for the stack trace; or read the ANCM event-log entry.
issues.knownFix: Fix the specific captured startup exception.
issues.preventionRule: Validate startup fast; test publish via Kestrel before IIS.
issues.detectBy: 500.30 response from the site.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: check Event Viewer + stdout logs + appsettings + runtime bundle before code changes.

issues.title: ASP.NET Core 502.5 process startup failure
issues.symptoms: HTTP 502.5 process failure; ANCM cannot start/reach the worker.
issues.rootCause: Missing runtime, wrong processPath, immediate crash, or ANCM/Kestrel handshake timeout.
issues.diagnosticCommand: dotnet --list-runtimes ; run 'dotnet ./publish/App.dll' ; read ANCM event log.
issues.knownFix: Install/repair runtime, fix processPath/arguments, resolve the revealed crash.
issues.preventionRule: Pin runtime; verify the publish runs standalone before IIS.
issues.detectBy: 502.5 response from the site.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: verify runtime + processPath + clean direct run before code changes.

issues.title: LocalDB vs SQL Express differences
issues.symptoms: Works on LocalDB in dev, fails on SQL Express in deployment (or reverse).
issues.rootCause: LocalDB is per-user on-demand with no network endpoint; SQL Express is a networked service.
issues.diagnosticCommand: sqlcmd against each instance to confirm type and reachability.
issues.knownFix: Standardize on SQL Express for servers; fix connection string; provision app-pool login.
issues.preventionRule: Develop and test on the same engine you deploy to.
issues.detectBy: Connection string names localdb while deploying to a server.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: LocalDB is not a server engine; switch to SQL Express with proper login.

issues.title: Database backup / restore failure
issues.symptoms: BACKUP/RESTORE access-denied, exclusive-access, or wrong-backup-set errors.
issues.rootCause: SQL service-account path rights, active connections, or missing WITH REPLACE/MOVE.
issues.diagnosticCommand: RESTORE FILELISTONLY/HEADERONLY ; verify service-account rights; SET SINGLE_USER WITH ROLLBACK IMMEDIATE.
issues.knownFix: Grant folder rights to SQL service account, clear connections, use WITH REPLACE/MOVE.
issues.preventionRule: Store backups where the SQL service can read/write; script restore with explicit MOVE.
issues.detectBy: Backup/restore job error code (5 / exclusive access / wrong backup set).
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: check service-account path rights and active connections first.

issues.title: File / folder permission failure (NTFS access denied)
issues.symptoms: UnauthorizedAccessException / access denied writing to a data/keys/log path.
issues.rootCause: App-pool identity lacks NTFS Modify, broken inheritance, or protected path.
issues.diagnosticCommand: icacls <path> ; read the exact denied path from the exception.
issues.knownFix: Grant Modify to the app-pool identity on the specific folder, or relocate writable data.
issues.preventionRule: Keep writable data in a dedicated folder with explicit ACLs at deploy time.
issues.detectBy: UnauthorizedAccessException on a known writable path (e.g. keys/).
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: grant scoped Modify on that path, not broad permissions.

issues.title: Windows service / process file-lock failure
issues.symptoms: 'File in use' / cannot overwrite assembly during deploy.
issues.rootCause: Running worker/service/dotnet process holds the file.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Identify holding process; stop the IIS site/app pool or drop app_offline.htm.
issues.knownFix: Stop app pool/site (or use app_offline.htm), deploy, restart.
issues.preventionRule: Use app_offline.htm before copying and remove it after.
issues.detectBy: File-in-use error during a deploy/copy step.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: stop the site/app pool or drop app_offline.htm before replacing locked files.

issues.title: Playwright / browser install failure
issues.symptoms: 'browser executable doesn't exist' / missing host dependencies.
issues.rootCause: Browsers not installed, wrong runtime, or missing OS libraries.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Run the Playwright install command and read the missing browser/dependency.
issues.knownFix: Install browsers + OS dependencies; pin Playwright version to driver.
issues.preventionRule: Make browser install an explicit version-pinned setup step.
issues.detectBy: 'browser executable doesn't exist' at test start.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: run the Playwright install step for the host before debugging tests.

issues.title: GitHub release upload failure
issues.symptoms: 'asset already exists', 401/403, or large-asset timeout.
issues.rootCause: Duplicate asset name, insufficient token scope, or size/timeout limit.
issues.diagnosticCommand: gh release view <tag> ; verify token scopes.
issues.knownFix: Use --clobber, grant repo scope, retry/split large uploads.
issues.preventionRule: Use unique versioned asset names; verify token scope pre-release.
issues.detectBy: 'asset already exists' or 401/403 from gh.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: clobber/rename and check token scope before retry.

issues.title: PowerShell quoting / path issues
issues.symptoms: Positional-parameter error, split path, or wrong native args.
issues.rootCause: PowerShell argument parsing: unquoted spaces, leading-dash parsing, double-quote expansion.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Echo the argument array; invoke with & and quoted paths; use --% for literal native args.
issues.knownFix: Quote paths, use single quotes for literals, invoke via the call operator.
issues.preventionRule: Build argument lists as arrays, not concatenated strings.
issues.detectBy: PowerShell parameter/positional errors in a deploy script.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: quote paths and use the call operator / --% before blaming the tool.

issues.title: Long-path / clone-timeout, clone-retry 'destination exists' (firsthand)
issues.symptoms: 'Filename too long', clone timeout, then 'destination path already exists' on retry.
issues.rootCause: MAX_PATH limit, large-repo timeout, and leftover partial clone directory not cleaned before retry.
issues.diagnosticCommand: git config --get core.longpaths ; test if the target clone dir exists/non-empty.
issues.knownFix: Enable core.longpaths, shallow-clone or extend timeout, and delete the partial dir before retry.
issues.preventionRule: On the failure path, clean the destination directory before retrying.
issues.detectBy: Clone timeout followed by 'destination exists' on retry.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: delete the partial clone dir before retry and enable long paths.

issues.title: Large-repo benchmark failure
issues.symptoms: Benchmark hang, OOM, or step-timeout on a large repo.
issues.rootCause: Unbounded enumeration, full-file materialization, or oversized single transactions.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Measure peak memory and per-step time; count files and largest file sizes.
issues.knownFix: Stream/batch processing, cap file size, paginate writes, split timeouts.
issues.preventionRule: Enforce per-repo limits and process in bounded batches.
issues.detectBy: Benchmark exceeds time/memory thresholds on large repos.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: batch and bound usage rather than raising limits blindly.

issues.title: Ollama model-availability issue
issues.symptoms: 'model not found' / connection refused, or a hard failure where degrade was expected.
issues.rootCause: Ollama down, model not pulled, or optional dependency treated as mandatory.
issues.diagnosticCommand: curl http://localhost:11434/api/tags
issues.knownFix: Pull the configured model, or ensure graceful degradation when Ollama is absent.
issues.preventionRule: Gate Ollama behind a config flag; never make a page depend on it.
issues.detectBy: Inference call fails or returns 'model not found'.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: Ollama is optional — pull the model or fall back; never block a page.

issues.title: Qdrant / vector-store connection issue
issues.symptoms: Retrieval errors or a page stall caused by a live Qdrant call.
issues.rootCause: Qdrant down/misconfigured, or a synchronous probe on the request path.
issues.diagnosticCommand: curl http://localhost:6333/collections ; confirm health comes from the cache.
issues.knownFix: Read Qdrant health from IServiceHealthCache; degrade retrieval gracefully; remove synchronous probes.
issues.preventionRule: Qdrant is optional and REST-only; never call it synchronously in a controller or view.
issues.detectBy: Page stall with a Qdrant call on the request path, or retrieval errors.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: move the probe off the request path and degrade gracefully.

issues.title: OCR / PDF processing failure
issues.symptoms: Empty/garbled OCR text, PDF parse failure, or OCR engine not found.
issues.rootCause: Image-only PDF, missing engine/language data, low DPI, or encrypted/corrupt PDF.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Detect text-layer presence; verify OCR engine + language data; inspect DPI.
issues.knownFix: Route image-only PDFs through OCR at adequate DPI; extract directly when text exists.
issues.preventionRule: Branch on text-layer presence; retain provenance (extracted vs OCR).
issues.detectBy: Empty/garbled OCR output or PDF parse failure.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: verify text-layer/engine/DPI; keep provenance; never assert OCR text as authoritative.

issues.title: SFTP / SMTP integration failure
issues.symptoms: SFTP host-key/auth failure; SMTP auth/TLS/relay-denied error.
issues.rootCause: SFTP: host key/credentials/firewall. SMTP: port/TLS mode/auth/relay policy.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Test SFTP host-key fingerprint; test SMTP port+TLS and read the reply code.
issues.knownFix: Pin host key + correct creds; set correct SMTP port/TLS and authenticate as a permitted sender.
issues.preventionRule: Store host keys/credentials securely; validate in a health check.
issues.detectBy: Integration job fails with auth/TLS/relay error.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: verify host key / port / TLS / credentials before code changes.

issues.title: WordPress REST API integration failure
issues.symptoms: 401/403, rest_no_route 404, or missing Authorization header.
issues.rootCause: No application password, stripped auth header, plain permalinks, or insufficient capability.
issues.diagnosticCommand: GET /wp-json/ ; verify the Authorization header reaches PHP.
issues.knownFix: Use Application Passwords, forward the auth header, set pretty permalinks, grant the right role.
issues.preventionRule: Store the application password securely; confirm header forwarding.
issues.detectBy: 401/403/rest_no_route from a WordPress call.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: check app password, header forwarding, permalinks, capabilities first.

issues.title: Odoo external API integration failure
issues.symptoms: Auth failure, access-rights error, or 'database not found'.
issues.rootCause: Wrong database, missing API key/credentials, or insufficient model access/record rules.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Call common/authenticate for a uid; confirm DB name; test a read on an allowed model.
issues.knownFix: Use correct DB + API key/credentials; grant required access rights/groups.
issues.preventionRule: Dedicated least-privilege integration user; store API key as a secret.
issues.detectBy: Odoo auth/access-rights/db-not-found error.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: verify DB name, API key/credentials, and access rights first.

issues.title: ERPNext / Frappe API integration failure
issues.symptoms: 401/403, PermissionError, or CSRF/token error.
issues.rootCause: Wrong/missing token header, insufficient DocType role, or wrong auth mode.
issues.diagnosticCommand: GET /api/method/frappe.auth.get_logged_user with the token header.
issues.knownFix: Use 'Authorization: token api_key:api_secret', grant DocType roles, use correct endpoints.
issues.preventionRule: Dedicated scoped API user; store api_secret as a secret.
issues.detectBy: 401/403/PermissionError from Frappe.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: verify token header format and DocType permissions first.

issues.title: WooCommerce REST API integration failure
issues.symptoms: 401 'consumer key missing', signature error, or HTTP-only auth failure.
issues.rootCause: Keys not sent correctly, OAuth1 signature needed over HTTP, or stripped auth header.
issues.diagnosticCommand: GET /wp-json/wc/v3/ with key/secret as basic auth over HTTPS.
issues.knownFix: Use HTTPS basic auth (key:secret) or OAuth1 over HTTP; ensure header forwarding.
issues.preventionRule: Use HTTPS + basic auth; store keys as secrets.
issues.detectBy: 401/consumer-key/signature error from WooCommerce.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: use HTTPS+basic auth and verify header forwarding first.

issues.title: Magento REST/GraphQL API integration failure
issues.symptoms: 401, token expired, or 'not authorized to access resource'.
issues.rootCause: Expired token, missing ACL resources, or wrong/store-scoped endpoint.
issues.diagnosticCommand: POST integration/admin/token for a bearer token; call rest/V1/... ; review ACL.
issues.knownFix: Refresh token, grant required ACL resources, use correct endpoint.
issues.preventionRule: Use a scoped integration and handle token refresh.
issues.detectBy: 401/token-expired/not-authorized from Magento.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: refresh token and verify ACL/endpoint first.

issues.title: Drupal JSON:API / REST integration failure
issues.symptoms: 403/406 or missing-module 404.
issues.rootCause: JSON:API/REST module disabled, wrong Accept header, or insufficient permissions.
issues.diagnosticCommand: GET /jsonapi with Accept: application/vnd.api+json ; confirm the module is enabled.
issues.knownFix: Enable the module, send correct headers, grant the role permissions.
issues.preventionRule: Pin the API module set; use a scoped role.
issues.detectBy: 403/406/404 from Drupal API.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: verify module, headers, and permissions first.

issues.title: Keycloak / OIDC integration failure
issues.symptoms: invalid redirect_uri, signature/issuer validation error, or rejected token.
issues.rootCause: Unregistered redirect URI, clock skew, wrong issuer/audience, or untrusted JWKS.
issues.diagnosticCommand: GET <authority>/.well-known/openid-configuration ; compare redirect URIs; inspect token aud/iss.
issues.knownFix: Register exact redirect URI, align issuer/audience, allow clock skew, ensure JWKS reachable.
issues.preventionRule: Single source of truth for issuer/audience/redirect; trust JWKS by discovery.
issues.detectBy: OIDC redirect/signature/issuer error.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: verify redirect URI, issuer/audience, and JWKS first.

issues.title: Entra ID claims-mapping failure
issues.symptoms: Authenticated but missing roles/groups/email, or authorization fails with a valid token.
issues.rootCause: App roles/optional claims not configured, group object IDs vs names, or wrong claim type read.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Decode the issued token; inspect claims; compare to the app's policy claim names.
issues.knownFix: Configure app roles/optional claims, map group IDs to roles, read the correct claim type.
issues.preventionRule: Define and explicitly map a claims contract; never assume display names.
issues.detectBy: Authenticated session with empty authorization claims.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: inspect token claims and align mapping before changing policy code.

issues.title: Reverse-proxy / forwarded-headers misconfiguration
issues.symptoms: http redirects, proxy IP seen as client, or wrong OIDC redirect URI behind a proxy.
issues.rootCause: Forwarded headers not honored/configured; scheme/host/IP taken from the proxy hop.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Log request scheme/host and remote IP as the app sees them; compare to proxy headers.
issues.knownFix: Enable ForwardedHeaders middleware early; configure KnownProxies/KnownNetworks; ensure the proxy sets headers.
issues.preventionRule: Configure forwarded headers whenever a proxy terminates TLS.
issues.detectBy: http redirects or wrong client IP behind a proxy.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: enable/configure forwarded headers before debugging redirect/auth logic.

issues.title: CORS / auth-cookie cross-site failure
issues.symptoms: CORS block or auth cookie not sent cross-site.
issues.rootCause: CORS policy/credentials misconfig, or cookie SameSite/Secure wrong, or no credentials:include.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Inspect preflight headers and Set-Cookie attributes; confirm the request sends credentials.
issues.knownFix: CORS policy with specific origin + AllowCredentials; cookie SameSite=None;Secure; client sends credentials.
issues.preventionRule: Scope CORS to known origins (never * with credentials); set cookie attributes deliberately.
issues.detectBy: Blocked CORS request or dropped auth cookie cross-site.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: align CORS origin/credentials and cookie SameSite/Secure first.

issues.title: Upload-size / request-limit failure
issues.symptoms: 404.13, 413, or 400 'request body too large' on upload.
issues.rootCause: IIS maxAllowedContentLength or Kestrel/MVC body/multipart limit too low (or mismatched).
issues.diagnosticCommand: Upload a file just over the limit and read the exact status to identify the rejecting layer.
issues.knownFix: Raise maxAllowedContentLength and Kestrel/MVC body+multipart limits consistently.
issues.preventionRule: Set upload limits explicitly, test at boundaries, keep as low as feasible.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: align IIS and Kestrel request-size limits before code changes.

issues.title: DB timeout / connection-pool exhaustion (firsthand: GroupBy / large-text hang)
issues.symptoms: Timeout expired, pool exhausted, or a page hang under load.
issues.rootCause: Undisposed contexts, slow/unindexed queries, GroupBy(_ => 1) aggregates, or large-text materialization.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Find undisposed scopes; inspect slow queries; search for GroupBy(_ => 1) and large-text list loads.
issues.knownFix: Dispose contexts, use separate CountAsync(), project to lightweight records, add indexes.
issues.preventionRule: No blocking external calls or large-text loads on the request path; use lightweight read models.
issues.detectBy: A 'started' request log with no matching 'completed' line, or pool-exhaustion errors.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: remove group-by-constant and large-text loads and fix leaks before scaling the pool.

issues.title: High-memory benchmark failure (OOM)
issues.symptoms: OutOfMemoryException or the process killed during a benchmark.
issues.rootCause: Whole-dataset loads, unbounded result accumulation, or LOH fragmentation.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Capture peak working set + GC stats; find the largest allocations.
issues.knownFix: Stream/batch, use paging/IAsyncEnumerable, release per batch, cap concurrency.
issues.preventionRule: Bound memory by design; measure peak memory in the benchmark.
issues.detectBy: OOM or working-set spike in a benchmark run.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: stream/batch and cap concurrency rather than adding RAM.

issues.title: Production incident rollback failure
issues.symptoms: Rollback does not restore service; missing prior artifact or irreversible migration.
issues.rootCause: No retained artifact, destructive migration, or config/data not reverted with code.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Confirm the previous artifact + DB backup are restorable; check if the release applied a one-way migration.
issues.knownFix: Redeploy retained artifact, restore pre-release backup for destructive changes, revert config with code.
issues.preventionRule: Keep the previous artifact, take a pre-release backup, prefer additive/reversible migrations.
issues.detectBy: Rollback step fails or service stays down after revert.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: restore artifact + backup, revert config, and flag destructive migrations blocking rollback.

issues.title: Invoke-WebRequest won't send credentials over HTTP (firsthand)
issues.symptoms: Scripted 401 over http to a Windows-auth endpoint that works in a browser.
issues.rootCause: The HTTP client refuses to send credentials over an unencrypted channel.
issues.diagnosticCommand: Run the same request over https vs http, with and without credentials, and compare.
issues.knownFix: Probe over HTTPS, or test auth via a browser/curl with explicit settings.
issues.preventionRule: Run authenticated probes over HTTPS.
issues.detectBy: Scripted 401 on a Windows-auth endpoint that succeeds in a browser.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: the probe transport (HTTP) is the cause, not the app's auth.

issues.title: appcmd attribute path quirk (firsthand)
issues.symptoms: appcmd set no-ops, wrong section, or parse failure with special-character paths.
issues.rootCause: Wrong section path, missing /commit scope, or unquoted special-character values.
issues.diagnosticCommand: appcmd list config to read the effective value and confirm the change applied.
issues.knownFix: Quote values, use correct /section and /commit:apphost, verify with list config.
issues.preventionRule: Always read back config after appcmd set.
issues.detectBy: appcmd 'success' with no effective change.
issues.fixOrWarn: Warn: quote paths, set the right section/commit, verify with list config.
